title: Emotional Tone Summarization in Multimodal Content
scenario: Create a prompt that will generate an emotional tone summary of a multimodal content piece, such as a video or podcast episode, by analyzing the spoken words, music, and visual cues. The LLM output should be a text summary, 150-200 words in length, that captures the dominant emotional tone and provides examples of key moments that contribute to this tone.
constraints: Must include a description of the multimodal content and the desired emotional tone summary
Must analyze both spoken words and non-verbal cues (music, visual)

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks the accuracy of the emotional tone summary and its connection to the multimodal content
Evaluates the thoroughness of the analysis, including the consideration of both spoken words and non-verbal cues
Assesses the quality and informativeness of the summary, including the accuracy of the presented information
Ensures the summary adheres to the target length and is not excessively long or short
